debug_info.goal:
C : Set (Fin 2 → ℝ)
hC : Convex ℝ C
x : Fin 4 → Fin 2 → ℝ
y : Set (Fin 4) → Fin 2 → ℝ
hxy : ∀ (i : Fin 4) (s : Set (Fin 4)), x i + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s
⊢ False

by
  have key : ∀ s t : Set (Fin 4), ∀ a b : ℝ, 0 ≤ a → 0 ≤ b → a + b = 1 →
    ∀ i j, a • (x i + y s) + b • (x j + y t) = a • x i + b • x j + (a • y s + b • y t) := by
    intros; ring
  exact absurd ((hxy 0 {0, 2}).mpr (by simp)) (fun _ => absurd ((hxy 1 {0, 2}).mp (hC ((hxy 0 {0, 2}).mpr (by simp)) ((hxy 2 {0, 2}).mpr (by simp)) (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) ≤ 1/2) (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) ≤ 1/2) (by norm_num : (1:ℝ)/2 + 1/2 = 1))) (by simp))
